title: RGB Enchantment Glint
description: This resourcepack changes the default purple enchantment glint to RGB illumination
body:
This resourcepack changes the default purple enchantment glint to RGB and adds Bedrock Edition-like pixelization.

The glint strength can be configured in **Options > Accessibility Settings > Glint Strength**
![Armor stands with enchanted armor and tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3df32233044fb6337c6248b98751fdaba4875f65.jpeg)
